emails.subject: Re: Index forwards/swaps
emails.body: Bob Badeer is handling the negotiations of the index changes, and he has assured me that all deals liquidating within this month have been updated. He is still working out the other deals. If this is causing you any difficulty, please let me know. Thanks, Monica Enron Capital Trade Resources Corp. From: Kimberly Allen 02/14/2001 11:41 AM

emails.subject: Re: Index forwards/swaps
emails.body: Kate Monica, do you know when these will be changed in Enpower to reflect the Dow Jones Index? Thanks, Kimberly Indelicato Forwarded by Kimberly Allen/HOU/ECT on 02/14/2001 01:41 PM Enron North America Corp. From: Kimberly Allen 02/08/2001 09:29 AM
